notes:
right operand 'Y' has type Integer (range -9_223_372_036_854_775_808 .. 9_223_372_036_854_775_807),
which includes zero.

no preceding conditional or subtype constraint establishes
Y /= 0 on all paths reaching this division.
rule: D27 Rule 3 (Division by Provably Nonzero Divisor)

per spec/02-restrictions.md section 2.8.3 paragraph 133:
"The right operand of the operators /, mod, and rem shall be
provably nonzero at compile time."

per spec/02-restrictions.md section 2.8.3 paragraph 134:
"If none of the conditions in paragraph 133 holds, the program
is nonconforming and a conforming implementation shall reject
the expression with a diagnostic."
suggestions:
or use a positive subtype that excludes zero:
type Positive_Value is range 1 .. 100;

scope.negative_emit_note: Negative source seam cases are check-only in this gate because safec emit must refuse to write artifacts when diagnostics exist.

diagnostics.message: index expression not provably within array bounds
notes: array 'T' has index range Idx (1 .. 50).

index expression 'Idx (call)' has type Integer, with range
[Integer'First .. Integer'Last].

static analysis cannot establish that the index is within
[1 .. 50] on all execution paths.
rule: D27 Rule 2 (Provable Index Safety)

per spec/02-restrictions.md section 2.8.2 paragraph 131:
"The index expression in an indexed_component shall be provably
within the array object's index bounds at compile time."

per spec/02-restrictions.md section 2.8.2 paragraph 132:
"If neither condition holds, the program is nonconforming and
the implementation shall reject it with a diagnostic identifying
the indexed_component and the unresolvable bound relationship."

check.stdout:
{"format":"diagnostics-v0","diagnostics":[{"reason":"index_out_of_bounds","message":"index expression not provably within array bounds","path":"$REPO_ROOT/tests/negative/neg_rule2_dynamic.safe","span":{"start_line":24,"start_col":14,"end_line":24,"end_col":43},"highlight_span":{"start_line":24,"start_col":14,"end_line":24,"end_col":43},"notes":["array 'T' has index range Idx (1 .. 50).","index expression 'Idx (call)' has type Integer, with range
[Integer'First .. Integer'Last].","static analysis cannot establish that the index is within
[1 .. 50] on all execution paths.","rule: D27 Rule 2 (Provable Index Safety)","per spec/02-restrictions.md section 2.8.2 paragraph 131:
"The index expression in an indexed_component shall be provably
within the array object's index bounds at compile time."","per spec/02-restrictions.md section 2.8.2 paragraph 132:
"If neither condition holds, the program is nonconforming and
the implementation shall reject it with a diagnostic identifying
the indexed_component and the unresolvable bound relationship.""],"suggestions":["add a bounds check before indexing:
if call >= 1 and then call <= 50 then
   return T (Idx (call));
end if;"]}]}
